summary: Adjusted the opening to avoid repeating chapter 17's time-led scaffold and added a final bakery cue to strengthen the handoff into the next chapter.
edits: Reframed the opening around Cora's Singer and sale tag instead of a 'By [time]' construction.
Removed the duplicated Singer description from the opening inventory paragraph.
Specified that Hester drives them toward the bakery to tighten the transition into chapter 17.
